revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: remove obsolete category Star Wars
Bot: remove obsolete category Star Wars characters
Bot: remove obsolete category Star Wars lists
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Draft_categories%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Draft_categories%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
{{High-use}}
{{tsh|draftcat}}
{{lua|Module:String}}
<!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
This template can be used when non-article pages like drafts and [[WP:USERNOCAT|user pages]] have categories meant for articles. The categories will be displayed but the page will not be added to the categories. If the page is moved to mainspace then the categories will automatically work as normal but the template should be removed.

== Usage ==
Wrap categories in this code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Draft categories|
...
}}</syntaxhighlight>

Sort keys and leading colons are allowed in the categories. Only use this template around a list of categories and not around a whole page or transclusion. {{tl|Suppress categories}} can be used for that.

== Tracking category ==
The category {{Cl|Articles using draft categories|count=yes|count_type=all}} tracks pages that are using the template in the [[WP:NS0|main namespace]]. This template should be removed from those articles.

== Example ==
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Draft categories|

[[:Category:Lists of Disney characters]]
[[:Category:Lists of fictional military personnel|Star Wars]]
}}</syntaxhighlight>

The output looks similar to the real display of categories on normal pages. The above produces:
{{Draft categories|

[[:Category:Lists of Disney characters]]
[[:Category:Lists of fictional military personnel|Star Wars]]
}}

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||
<!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata -->
}}</includeonly>

== TemplateData ==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Categories",
			"required": true,
			"suggested": true,
			"example": "",
			"type": "content"
		}
	},
	"description": "Stores and displays article categories in drafts without adding them to the category",
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>

== Notes ==
{{User:Tol/Template/Used by TolBot|task=4}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Draft namespace templates]]
[[Category:Wikipedia categorization|τDraft categories]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Draft_categories%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
{{High-use}}
{{tsh|draftcat}}
{{lua|Module:String}}

This template can be used when non-article pages like drafts and [[WP:USERNOCAT|user pages]] have categories meant for articles. The categories will be displayed but the page will not be added to the categories. If the page is moved to mainspace then the categories will automatically work as normal but the template should be removed.

== Usage ==
Wrap categories in this code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Draft categories|
...
}}</syntaxhighlight>

Sort keys and leading colons are allowed in the categories. Only use this template around a list of categories and not around a whole page or transclusion. {{tl|Suppress categories}} can be used for that.

== Tracking category ==
The category {{Cl|Articles using draft categories|count=yes|count_type=all}} tracks pages that are using the template in the [[WP:NS0|main namespace]]. This template should be removed from those articles.

== Example ==
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext">{{Draft categories|

[[:Category:Lists of Disney characters]]
[[:Category:Lists of fictional military personnel|Star Wars]]
}}</syntaxhighlight>

The output looks similar to the real display of categories on normal pages. The above produces:
{{Draft categories|

[[:Category:Lists of Disney characters]]
[[:Category:Lists of fictional military personnel|Star Wars]]
}}

<includeonly>{{sandbox other||

}}</includeonly>

== TemplateData ==
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"1": {
			"label": "Categories",
			"required": true,
			"suggested": true,
			"example": "",
			"type": "content"
		}
	},
	"description": "Stores and displays article categories in drafts without adding them to the category",
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>

== Notes ==
{{User:Tol/Template/Used by TolBot|task=4}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Draft namespace templates]]
[[Category:Wikipedia categorization|τDraft categories]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
